name: Mexican Chef Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Smoked Sausage, Cut Into Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown smoked sausage in a skillet.
2. Add beans, chili powder, and cumin to the skillet. Cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring often until heated through.
3. Toss together lettuce, green pepper, tomatoes, cheese, avocado, and celery with dressing and hot pepper sauce.
4. Add taco chips.
5. Mix in the hot sausage/bean mixture and serve immediately.
